name: Confetti Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave popcorn according to package directions.
2. Grease an 8-inch square pan. Remove unpopped kernals from the popcorn.
3. In a large greased bowl, combine the popcorn with candy and peanuts.
4. Place the marshmallows and butter in a microwave-safe container.
5. Microwave on HIGH for 1-1/2 to 2 minutes or until melted and smooth, stirring once halfway through cooking.
6. Pour the marshmallow mixture over the popcorn mixture; toss until evenly coated.
7. With buttered hands, press the mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Refrigerate until firm. Cut into bars.
